title: Artefact Smp
description: Transform your server with 11 legendary artifacts, dynamic PvE arenas, and a mystical fragment
body:
🌟 Artefact - RPG Items & Dynamic Arenas

Transform your server with 11 legendary artifacts, automatic PvE arenas, and a mystical fragment economy!

✨ Key Features
⚔️ 11 Unique Artifacts

3 Legendary Weapons: Bloody Sword (combo damage), Teleporting Bow, Void Blade (armor pierce + shadow strike)

3 Magical Armors: Sixth Sense Helmet (ESP), Wind Boots (double jump + no fall damage), Mirage Cape (invisibility dodge)

5 Mystic Items: Time Orb (slow enemies), Soul Amulet (regeneration stacks), Storm Staff (lightning + rain speed), Link Stone (waypoint teleport), Nature Heart (plant growth + passive regen)

🏛️ Dynamic Arena System

Auto-spawn every 30 minutes (50% chance)

5 progressive waves with custom-named mobs

Protected chest unlocks only after defeating all waves

Spectacular 4-phase particle animations

Auto-cleanup and terrain restoration

💎 Fragment Economy

Earn Mystical Fragments from arena chests

Open Artifact Shop GUI by right-clicking a fragment

Artifacts are server-synced: once purchased, removed from all players’ shops

🎮 How It Works

An arena spawns randomly with a server broadcast

Players approach → wave system starts

Defeat 5 waves of mobs

Chest unlocks → collect fragments

Buy artifacts for 5 fragments each

Use your powers to dominate PvE & PvP

📋 Commands
/giveartefact [item]     # Give specific artifact  
/giveartefact all        # Give all artifacts  
/arena                   # Force spawn arena (admin)  
/togglecooldown          # Toggle cooldowns (admin)  
/reloadartefact          # Reload plugin (admin)  

⚙️ Requirements

Minecraft: 1.21.8

Server: Spigot or Paper

Dependency: WorldEdit 7.2.0+

Schematic: totem.schem (must contain a chest)

🚀 Installation

Download Artefact.jar

Install WorldEdit

Place totem.schem in plugins/WorldEdit/schematics/

Start your server

Customize chest loot inside the schematic

🎯 Perfect For

✅ PvE / Adventure servers
✅ Survival servers with progression
✅ Mini-game or Event servers

🔥 Highlights

No Pay-to-Win — all obtainable in-game

Lag-free particle animations

Full multi-world support

Anti-grief protection

Crash recovery (restores terrain)

Plug & play — zero configuration required

💬 Support

Found a bug?
Open an issue including:

Plugin version

Minecraft version

Relevant logs

Version: 1.0.0
License: MIT
Developer: Ocer
